title: Brevo vs Flodesk (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Brevo vs Flodesk: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool for your needs.
intro: Choosing between Brevo and Flodesk comes down to your specific use case. Both are legitimate email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. Brevo is built for transactional email and multi-channel marketing, while Flodesk targets visual brands, photographers, and designers. This comparison covers the key differences so you can decide quickly.
choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on transactional email and multi-channel marketing
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on visual brands, photographers, and designers

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Brevo wins for transactional email and multi-channel marketing, while Flodesk is stronger for visual brands, photographers, and designers. Neither is objectively better — the right choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Brevo or Flodesk?
faq.a: Brevo starts at a lower price point ($25/mo vs $38/mo). However, pricing scales with subscriber count, so the total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Flodesk to Brevo?
faq.a: Yes, switching from Flodesk to Brevo is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export for subscriber lists. Plan for some time to recreate automations and templates, as these rarely transfer directly between platforms.
